channel.title: Pages on Moreno's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Moreno's Blog

item.title: About
item.description:
Hello! My name is Kauã Moreno, and this is Moreno’s Blog.

I’m a Information Systems student at USP, and I created this blog as a place to document my learning, share experiments, and record things I’m studying or building throughout my journey in technology.

Here you will mainly find posts about:

  • Backend
  • Web Development
  • Linux
  • Cybersecurity

The idea is to use this space as a kind of technical journal, where I write about knowledge, notes, experiments, and projects. Besides helping me organize what I’m learning, I also hope the content can be useful to other people studying technology.

Links

  • GitHub: https://github.com/kauamoreno
  • LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/kauamoreno
  • Email: kmoreno.tech@gmail.com
